name: The Story of Europa-Park
overview: This is the story of how a family who produced rides and carriages for showmen runs Germany's largest amusement park. It is a unique development how the small, sleepy fishing village of Rust became a place marked by success. A career that not even the Mack family could have dreamed of. We look behind the development of the park, which obstacles had to be overcome and find out who was an ally of the Macks.

trailers.title: Official Trailer "The Story of Europa-Park" - Exclusively on VEEJOY
